subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God and my Heart's Desire! This handmaiden from among Thy maidservants hath clung to the cord of Thy loving-kindness and hath responded when the Call was raised [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا الهی و مقصودی هذه امه من امائک تمسکت بحبل عنایتک و اجابت اذ ارتفع
